component.name: SMB Audiobook Creator
component.summary: Create chapterized .m4b and .mp3 audiobooks from source audio files

description.p: SMB Audiobook Creator is a desktop tool for preparing audiobook releases from folders of source audio files. It creates chapterized M4B outputs, optional MP3 copies, and writes audiobook metadata in a single guided workflow.
The app is designed for audiobook production work and bundles the command-line tools it needs to transcode, merge, and tag files locally on your machine.

ul.li: Import chapter files from a folder or add them manually
Reorder or exclude chapters before building the final audiobook
Write title, author, narrator, year, description, and cover art metadata
Create a chapterized M4B and an optional MP3 copy in one build
Review the full build log when a conversion step fails
